title: TOPDON ArtiDiag600 Elite OBD2 Scanner, 2025 Full-System Car Diagnostic Tool, 13 Maintenance Services, FCA AutoAuth, Automotive Scan Tool with CAN-FD, 2-Years of Free Updates.
features: [Incredible Value for Comprehensive Diagnostics] - Experience comprehensive vehicle diagnostics without breaking the bank. The ArtiDiag600 Elite OBD2 scanner offers a full-system diagnosis scan, covering all vehicle systems from the Engine, ABS, TCM, SAS, TPMS, and SRS with speed and accuracy. Easily read and clear DTCs, analyze real-time data and access ECU information—all in one affordable tool.

[9 Essential & 4 Advanced Reset Services for Complete Maintenance] - Take full control of vehicle health with ArtiDiag600 Elite. It not only supports 9 hot reset services like Oil Reset, Throttle Adaptation, and SAS Reset, helping you tackle everyday tasks easily, but it is also packed with 4 in-demand services, AFS Reset, AdBlue Reset, Stop/Start, and Windows Calibration. This scan tool covers all the routine car maintenance you’ll ever need.

[Extensive Vehicle Coverage—70+ Brands, 10,000+ Models] - The AD600 Elite is your go-to car diagnostic tool for over 70 brands and 10,000 vehicle models. With FCA Gateway access, you can perform full diagnostics on newer vehicles, including Chrysler, Jeep, Dodge, and Fiat models from 2017 onwards. Supporting the CAN-FD protocol, it works with 2024 models like GM's Blazer and Cadillac CT series, and Chrysler's Grand Cherokee and Grand Wagoneer.

[Smart Diagnostics with AutoVIN and Real-Time Data] - This car scanner simplifies vehicle diagnostics with the AutoVIN feature, which instantly reads your car’s VIN and provides precise information in seconds. Dive deeper into vehicle performance by monitoring live data—compare up to four data streams simultaneously to track trends and identify issues. Once your diagnostics are complete, generate detailed professional reports and share them effortlessly via email or QR code.

[Smooth, Fast, and Powerful - Upgraded Hardware for Peak Performance] - Powered by Android 11.0, the ArtiDiag600 Elite offers a smoother and faster diagnostic experience. With 2GB RAM and 32GB ROM, it ensures ample speed and storage for you to get the job done fast. The tool comes fully equipped with an OBD diagnostic cable, USB cable, quick start guide, and carrying case—everything you need to get started, anytime, anywher
